content.content:
1100	
1101	# Per-platform config: each entry defines the env vars, setup instructions,
1102	# and prompts needed to configure a messaging platform.
1103	_PLATFORMS = [
1104	    {
1105	        "key": "telegram",
1106	        "label": "Telegram",
1107	        "emoji": "📱",
1108	        "token_var": "TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN",
1109	        "setup_instructions": [
1110	            "1. Open Telegram and message @BotFather",
1111	            "2. Send /newbot and follow the prompts to create your bot",
1112	            "3. Copy the bot token BotFather gives you",
1113	            "4. To find your user ID: message @userinfobot — it replies with your numeric ID",
1114	        ],
1115	        "vars": [
1116	            {"name": "TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", "prompt": "Bot token", "password": True,
1117	             "help": "Paste the token from @BotFather (step 3 above)."},
1118	            {"name": "TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed user IDs (comma-separated)", "password": False,
1119	             "is_allowlist": True,
1120	             "help": "Paste your user ID from step 4 above."},
1121	            {"name": "TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL", "prompt": "Home channel ID (for cron/notification delivery, or empty to set later with /set-home)", "password": False,
1122	             "help": "For DMs, this is your user ID. You can set it later by typing /set-home in chat."},
1123	        ],
1124	    },
1125	    {
1126	        "key": "discord",
1127	        "label": "Discord",
1128	        "emoji": "💬",
1129	        "token_var": "DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN",
1130	        "setup_instructions": [
1131	            "1. Go to https://discord.com/developers/applications → New Application",
1132	            "2. Go to Bot → Reset Token → copy the bot token",
1133	            "3. Enable: Bot → Privileged Gateway Intents → Message Content Intent",
1134	            "4. Invite the bot to your server:",
1135	            "   OAuth2 → URL Generator → check BOTH scopes:",
1136	            "     - bot",
1137	            "     - applications.commands  (required for slash commands!)",
1138	            "   Bot Permissions: Send Messages, Read Message History, Attach Files",
1139	            "   Copy the URL and open it in your browser to invite.",
1140	            "5. Get your user ID: enable Developer Mode in Discord settings,",
1141	            "   then right-click your name → Copy ID",
1142	        ],
1143	        "vars": [
1144	            {"name": "DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN", "prompt": "Bot token", "password": True,
1145	             "help": "Paste the token from step 2 above."},
1146	            {"name": "DISCORD_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed user IDs or usernames (comma-separated)", "password": False,
1147	             "is_allowlist": True,
1148	             "help": "Paste your user ID from step 5 above."},
1149	            {"name": "DISCORD_HOME_CHANNEL", "prompt": "Home channel ID (for cron/notification delivery, or empty to set later with /set-home)", "password": False,
1150	             "help": "Right-click a channel → Copy Channel ID (requires Developer Mode)."},
1151	        ],
1152	    },
1153	    {
1154	        "key": "slack",
1155	        "label": "Slack",
1156	        "emoji": "💼",
1157	        "token_var": "SLACK_BOT_TOKEN",
1158	        "setup_instructions": [
1159	            "1. Go to https://api.slack.com/apps → Create New App → From Scratch",
1160	            "2. Enable Socket Mode: Settings → Socket Mode → Enable",
1161	            "   Create an App-Level Token with scope: connections:write → copy xapp-... token",
1162	            "3. Add Bot Token Scopes: Features → OAuth & Permissions → Scopes",
1163	            "   Required: chat:write, app_mentions:read, channels:history, channels:read,",
1164	            "   groups:history, im:history, im:read, im:write, users:read, files:write",
1165	            "4. Subscribe to Events: Features → Event Subscriptions → Enable",
1166	            "   Required events: message.im, message.channels, app_mention",
1167	            "   Optional: message.groups (for private channels)",
1168	            "   ⚠ Without message.channels the bot will ONLY work in DMs!",
1169	            "5. Install to Workspace: Settings → Install App → copy xoxb-... token",
1170	            "6. Reinstall the app after any scope or event changes",
1171	            "7. Find your user ID: click your profile → three dots → Copy member ID",
1172	            "8. Invite the bot to channels: /invite @YourBot",
1173	        ],
1174	        "vars": [
1175	            {"name": "SLACK_BOT_TOKEN", "prompt": "Bot Token (xoxb-...)", "password": True,
1176	             "help": "Paste the bot token from step 3 above."},
1177	            {"name": "SLACK_APP_TOKEN", "prompt": "App Token (xapp-...)", "password": True,
1178	             "help": "Paste the app-level token from step 4 above."},
1179	            {"name": "SLACK_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed user IDs (comma-separated)", "password": False,
1180	             "is_allowlist": True,
1181	             "help": "Paste your member ID from step 7 above."},
1182	        ],
1183	    },
1184	    {
1185	        "key": "matrix",
1186	        "label": "Matrix",
1187	        "emoji": "🔐",
1188	        "token_var": "MATRIX_ACCESS_TOKEN",
1189	        "setup_instructions": [
1190	            "1. Works with any Matrix homeserver (self-hosted Synapse/Conduit/Dendrite or matrix.org)",
1191	            "2. Create a bot user on your homeserver, or use your own account",
1192	            "3. Get an access token: Element → Settings → Help & About → Access Token",
1193	            "   Or via API: curl -X POST https://your-server/_matrix/client/v3/login \\",
1194	            "     -d '{\"type\":\"m.login.password\",\"user\":\"@bot:server\",\"password\":\"...\"}'",
1195	            "4. Alternatively, provide user ID + password and Hermes will log in directly",
1196	            "5. For E2EE: set MATRIX_ENCRYPTION=true (requires pip install 'matrix-nio[e2e]')",
1197	            "6. To find your user ID: it's @username:your-server (shown in Element profile)",
1198	        ],
1199	        "vars": [
1200	            {"name": "MATRIX_HOMESERVER", "prompt": "Homeserver URL (e.g. https://matrix.example.org)", "password": False,
1201	             "help": "Your Matrix homeserver URL. Works with any self-hosted instance."},
1202	            {"name": "MATRIX_ACCESS_TOKEN", "prompt": "Access token (leave empty to use password login instead)", "password": True,
1203	             "help": "Paste your access token, or leave empty and provide user ID + password below."},
1204	            {"name": "MATRIX_USER_ID", "prompt": "User ID (@bot:server — required for password login)", "password": False,
1205	             "help": "Full Matrix user ID, e.g. @hermes:matrix.example.org"},
1206	            {"name": "MATRIX_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed user IDs (comma-separated, e.g. @you:server)", "password": False,
1207	             "is_allowlist": True,
1208	             "help": "Matrix user IDs who can interact with the bot."},
1209	            {"name": "MATRIX_HOME_ROOM", "prompt": "Home room ID (for cron/notification delivery, or empty to set later with /set-home)", "password": False,
1210	             "help": "Room ID (e.g. !abc123:server) for delivering cron results and notifications."},
1211	        ],
1212	    },
1213	    {
1214	        "key": "mattermost",
1215	        "label": "Mattermost",
1216	        "emoji": "💬",
1217	        "token_var": "MATTERMOST_TOKEN",
1218	        "setup_instructions": [
1219	            "1. In Mattermost: Integrations → Bot Accounts → Add Bot Account",
1220	            "   (System Console → Integrations → Bot Accounts must be enabled)",
1221	            "2. Give it a username (e.g. hermes) and copy the bot token",
1222	            "3. Works with any self-hosted Mattermost instance — enter your server URL",
1223	            "4. To find your user ID: click your avatar (top-left) → Profile",
1224	            "   Your user ID is displayed there — click it to copy.",
1225	            "   ⚠ This is NOT your username — it's a 26-character alphanumeric ID.",
1226	            "5. To get a channel ID: click the channel name → View Info → copy the ID",
1227	        ],
1228	        "vars": [
1229	            {"name": "MATTERMOST_URL", "prompt": "Server URL (e.g. https://mm.example.com)", "password": False,
1230	             "help": "Your Mattermost server URL. Works with any self-hosted instance."},
1231	            {"name": "MATTERMOST_TOKEN", "prompt": "Bot token", "password": True,
1232	             "help": "Paste the bot token from step 2 above."},
1233	            {"name": "MATTERMOST_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed user IDs (comma-separated)", "password": False,
1234	             "is_allowlist": True,
1235	             "help": "Your Mattermost user ID from step 4 above."},
1236	            {"name": "MATTERMOST_HOME_CHANNEL", "prompt": "Home channel ID (for cron/notification delivery, or empty to set later with /set-home)", "password": False,
1237	             "help": "Channel ID where Hermes delivers cron results and notifications."},
1238	            {"name": "MATTERMOST_REPLY_MODE", "prompt": "Reply mode — 'off' for flat messages, 'thread' for threaded replies (default: off)", "password": False,
1239	             "help": "off = flat channel messages, thread = replies nest under your message."},
1240	        ],
1241	    },
1242	    {
1243	        "key": "whatsapp",
1244	        "label": "WhatsApp",
1245	        "emoji": "📲",
1246	        "token_var": "WHATSAPP_ENABLED",
1247	    },
1248	    {
1249	        "key": "signal",
1250	        "label": "Signal",
1251	        "emoji": "📡",
1252	        "token_var": "SIGNAL_HTTP_URL",
1253	    },
1254	    {
1255	        "key": "email",
1256	        "label": "Email",
1257	        "emoji": "📧",
1258	        "token_var": "EMAIL_ADDRESS",
1259	        "setup_instructions": [
1260	            "1. Use a dedicated email account for your Hermes agent",
1261	            "2. For Gmail: enable 2FA, then create an App Password at",
1262	            "   https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords",
1263	            "3. For other providers: use your email password or app-specific password",
1264	            "4. IMAP must be enabled on your email account",
1265	        ],
1266	        "vars": [
1267	            {"name": "EMAIL_ADDRESS", "prompt": "Email address", "password": False,
1268	             "help": "The email address Hermes will use (e.g., hermes@gmail.com)."},
1269	            {"name": "EMAIL_PASSWORD", "prompt": "Email password (or app password)", "password": True,
1270	             "help": "For Gmail, use an App Password (not your regular password)."},
1271	            {"name": "EMAIL_IMAP_HOST", "prompt": "IMAP host", "password": False,
1272	             "help": "e.g., imap.gmail.com for Gmail, outlook.office365.com for Outlook."},
1273	            {"name": "EMAIL_SMTP_HOST", "prompt": "SMTP host", "password": False,
1274	             "help": "e.g., smtp.gmail.com for Gmail, smtp.office365.com for Outlook."},
1275	            {"name": "EMAIL_ALLOWED_USERS", "prompt": "Allowed sender emails (comma-separated)", "password": False,
1276	             "is_allowlist": True,
1277	             "help": "Only emails from these addresses will be processed."},
1278	        ],
1279	    },
1280	    {
1281	        "key": "sms",
1282	        "label": "SMS (Twilio)",
1283	        "emoji": "📱",
1284	        "token_var": "TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID",
1285	        "setup_instructions": [
1286	            "1. Create a Twilio account at https://www.twilio.com/",
1287	            "2. Get your Account SID and Auth Token from the Twilio Console dashboard",
1288	            "3. Buy or configure a phone number capable of sending SMS",
1289	            "4. Set up your webhook URL for inbound SMS:",
1290	            "   Twilio Console → Phone Numbers → Active Numbers → your number",
1291	            "   → Messaging → A MESSAGE COMES IN → Webhook → https://your-server:8080/webhooks/twilio",
1292	        ],
1293	        "vars": [
1294	            {"name": "TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID", "prompt": "Twilio Account SID", "password": False,
1295	             "help": "Found on the Twilio Console dashboard."},
1296	            {"name": "TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN", "prompt": "Twilio Auth Token", "password": True,
1297	             "help": "Found on the Twilio Console dashboard (click to reveal)."},
1298	            {"name": "TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER", "prompt": "Twilio phone number (E.164 format, e.g. +15551234567)", "password": False,
1299	             "help": "The Twilio phone number to send SMS from."},

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
